description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js Package that can be triggered manually or when a release is created. In an ubuntu-latest job with read access to repository contents and write access to packages, check out the code, set up Node.js 16.x, navigate to the cxx-frontend package directory, update package.json and README.md with the new package name, install dependencies with npm ci, build the package, and publish it to npm using the GITHUB_TOKEN from secrets.
